TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-marriage_abas_pilaw

S.FORM: masang tu taqa iku tibatuan nani.
pawRat tinaku tamaku kila unay pa ngidanta.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽爸爸決定我的先生是他。
My mother and father decided that I should marry him.

S.FORM: mdaduna aizipna.
pameng ngid tu tikingciangan nani.
mai qadabu tikingciang sapaquniansu zinna.
S.TRANSL: 「Kingciang不能入贅，你喜歡他做什麼？」他們這樣說。
'Kingciang couldn’t marry into our family. Why do you like him?' they said.

S.FORM: quniakita anemta haw pawRat ti iku qaya nani.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有辦法，我就是喜歡他。
What should I do? I just like him.

S.FORM: alaanniq tibatu uzusa ti sunisku haw.
S.TRANSL: I married Batu and had two children.

S.FORM: qawman mtaqa.
mai isu qaqaliwunan.
en qapatay pa iku si kawka iku mlikay tibatuan zin na anemku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想，只有我死了，我才能離開Batu。
Only when I die can I leave Batu, I think.

S.FORM: quniakita mai tu ququnian anem yau aipa.
S.TRANSL: 沒有辦法在一起，還是要離開。
What could we do? (There is nothing we could do.)

S.FORM: qenasianem nayau anemku zinku kwa.
tatawa ti qaniyau pakunkuanku tawian.
S.TRANSL: I told them the story, and they kept laughing.

S.FORM: taw sayza nayau.
Raputuyanku tikingciang.
mai pama patay ya ya ahyangsu.
S.TRANSL: Your brother hadn't passed away then.

S.FORM: m.
mai pama patay ahyangsu nani.
S.TRANSL: Your brother hadn't passed away then.

S.FORM: Raputuyanku tu.
tiana kaputna tialan yau ti mawtu qman satutu yau ti nani.
maynep iku iluni zinta mani iku.
S.TRANSL: I fell asleep during the worship.

S.FORM: yau ti ya ti kingciang nani mana muRing isu zinna iku.
S.TRANSL: 有Kingciang，他問我「你為什麼哭呢？」
There was Kingciang (in my dream). 'Why are you crying?' he said.

S.FORM: mana mai iku muRing zinku nani.
nazau iku maynep kya qaqapanna ya zauku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我睡覺（的時候），他摸我的...。
When I was sleeping, he touched my... .

S.FORM: ya mai iku muRing zinsu mana mzizi ya limasu ka.
S.TRANSL: 你說沒有哭，為什麼你的手溼溼的？
You said you didn't cry, (but) why are your hands wet?

S.FORM: zinna nani.
madupung ti naiteikang yu.
watasinuzaisang sikusiwaketei ageilukala zinna iku ni kingciang.
S.TRANSL: 'I'll give you half of my property,' said Kingciang.

S.FORM: watasiwazaisang ilangyu antanoaiyu wasuliteilesiyu zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我說，「我不要你的財產，只要你愛我就夠了。」
'I don't want your properties. your love alone is enough,' I said.

S.FORM: pun ti iku sikawma nani.
Rameneng ti iku 'nay.
an alisya.
sinapawan ti qaqaku tikinciang.
mtaRaw ti.
a mtaRaw ti.
m.
tangi ti iku ma mRaputuy iku tamaizipana patay ti tibatu unay nani.
S.TRANSL: I dreamed of him (Kingciang) after Batu passed away.

S.FORM: yau pama tikingciang nani.
sanuaka si qanuni niRaputuyku mana nayau.
S.TRANSL: 我想問Kingciang我怎麼會作這樣的夢。
I wanted to ask Kingciang how come I dreamed such a dream.

S.FORM: matapun imi yau tiuqis matapun imi tikingciang.
qunianta sikwama.
pameng ti tmuzus tu qawianna saising ya.
S.TRANSL: （結果沒想到，沒有講，）Kingciang就去住院了。
(I didn’t tell him.) He went to the hospital.

S.FORM: nayau mai bunay anemku tuzus tu qapatayan.
mai qakalingu nani.
tayan pakunkuanku ti tayan nani mtawtawa ti qaniyau smanu ti qaya yu tinaku yu wazuq tibaRuq.
S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] 我媽媽講BaRuq就是這樣（不答應）。
[translation missing] 'BaRuq is like this,' said my mom.

S.FORM: zinna mai izau pawRat qaya ngid ala zinna na abuku.
S.TRANSL: 'I want Kingciang to marry into our family,' said my mom.

S.FORM: kyami qaqaqa tikingciang.
Rayngu madabu si.
S.TRANSL: He cannot marry into your family.

S.FORM: simtebes imi zinna.
S.TRANSL: 他們互相要（Abas的媽媽要Kingciang入贅，Kingciang的媽媽要Abas嫁過來）。
They pulled each other. (They wanted each other's child to marry into their family.)

S.FORM: masang mai smulud mai pama sinapawan mai smulud tibaRuq zinna mai pama sinapawan nani.
S.TRANSL: Not married yet at the time.

S.FORM: matiw imi taqimuyan tayan lepawnumi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們去警察局，你們的家就在那邊。
We went to the police station near your home.

S.FORM: matiw imi nani.
quniaka bula iku tu sunissu.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼辦呢？你的女兒給我。
What can we do? Give me your daughter.

S.FORM: zinan iku abaku ni abata tikuli nani.
bula iku tu sunissu mlulun iku quniaka smulud tu sunissu zinna na abaku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸講，我有傷口，你兒子給我。
My dad said, I'm hurt. Give me your son.

S.FORM: tama ti paqnanem sunisku tu Runanay si.
quniaka nayau tiana ti kuway.
mRasa imi tu zena tiana ti kuay zinna.
S.TRANSL: 我們有買水田，誰要工作？他說。
We bought the paddy field. Who will till the land? He said.

S.FORM: siqatulu imi matiw tuqaan na tamaku matiw.
S.TRANSL: 我們去了三次。我爸爸要當面講。
We went there three times. My father wanted to talk face to face.

S.FORM: en a qaya a nayau saqatulu imi matiw taqimuyan nani.
S.TRANSL: We went to the police station three times.

S.FORM: ngid ala tikingciangan nani taqa sulud tamaku kyami taqa sulud ya tamaku kyami nayau simtebes zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 想要Kingciang入贅，我爸爸不答應，互相拉扯，他說。
We wanted Kingciang to marry into our family, (but) my father didn't agree so they pulled each other, he said.

S.FORM: mai simkaliung qaya.
oh nayau ya yau kikung iku haw tu batu nani.
mai tu niana aimi kikung ne.
S.TRANSL: 我們結婚時沒有什麼東西。
We had nothing when we married.

S.FORM: o pameng imi ma matiw qaya sa iza u sa lalu’ung mala tibatuan nani.
S.TRANSL: We finally went to Lalu'ung to pick up Batu.

S.FORM: Raysezang ita saizi yau mai tu kawswa.
S.TRANSL: We didn't have umbrellas. We were exposed to the sun.

S.FORM: yau qudusta masang.
tanuzanna imi qaya tmanan.
S.TRANSL: He followed us when returning home.

S.FORM: tu mkikung ti yau iku ta yau imi ta inpanan yu.
S.TRANSL: 婚禮以後，我們待在房間。
After the wedding, we were in the room.

S.FORM: maded aimi.
kin tibatu kinawsa tu Rabi unay nani tatemunawan.
S.TRANSL: 我們倆那天晚上在客廳。
We two were at the living room that night.

S.FORM: wa nayau saiza kikung na masang zinku ya.
nayau nikikungan ay utani smani taqanan qaya.
S.TRANSL: I didn't know how many people were invited.

S.FORM: kikung zinta ti saizi nayau nayau saizi mai izau mai ti imi mzukat ta ta tataqanan yau.
S.TRANSL: 結婚就是這樣。就是那樣。沒有出來一起吃飯。
Marriage was like that. It's like that. We didn't have dinner with the guests.

S.FORM: tainpanan kinawsa.
S.TRANSL: We two stayed in the room.

S.FORM: qman imu qaya.
m ma.
nazau imi maded kinawsa yau qman ya baqian silazat silazat zinta saizi nayau mai imi paqadedanna tataqanan.
S.TRANSL: 我們倆沒有跟客人在桌子吃飯。
We didn't have dinner with the guests at the table.

S.FORM: zanumi ay maded imu taqadanan haw maded mai tu saqanan.
S.TRANSL: 你有坐到椅子（吃飯）？沒有吃的嗎？
Did you sit on the chair? Nothing to eat?

S.FORM: m mana kalingunanku ti ka.
mai iku kalingun.
mai imi maded.
S.TRANSL: We didn't eat with the guests.

S.FORM: yau imi tainpanan ne kinawsa nani.
S.TRANSL: We two stayed in the room.

S.FORM: tiana ti ngid sikawkawma qaya.
S.TRANSL: Who wanted to speak to him?

S.FORM: qipesanta ti mai imi sikawkawma.
S.TRANSL: I didn't like him. We didn't talk to each other.

S.FORM: nayau a simqipes ita haw mai sikawkawma.
S.TRANSL: We didn't like each other. We didn't speak to each other.

S.FORM: nayau ni 'daq kwa mai tu mai simqalizaqan haw.
S.TRANSL: 別人會這樣嗎？彼此不喜歡。
Would others be like this? You didn't like each other.

S.FORM: m mai tu anu simqalizaq aita qayau ita sikawkawma ya.
S.TRANSL: 對。如果彼此喜歡，就會聊天。
Yes. If we like each other, we will chat.

S.FORM: en ya tawtawa.
en ya zanumi ay nengi ti zanumi.
en ya niana zaniq zaku nani msyukay na tama tinalis.
haw en nani tama tinalis nani pameng mawtu kya kwa mana mawtu a baqian sebalas zinku.
S.TRANSL: 老人家Nalis突然來。他為什麼來？
The elder, Nalis, came suddenly. Why did he come?

S.FORM: ngid ala timaisu zinna nani.
smanu ti ya tu tamaku a.
qu nazau yu tiaRay zinna ti ya qu aiku nani.
mai pama iku ngid sinapawan unay.
S.TRANSL: I didn't want to get married then.

S.FORM: nansay ti isu unay ziwnanasay pa ti ziwluqsay tu .
S.TRANSL: 你那時幾歲？已經十六，快十七歲。

S.FORM: ziwkiwsay ka ziwnanasay kikung ti imi haw nani.
S.TRANSL: 十九歲。我們結婚的時候，我十七歲。
Nineteen years old. I was seventeen years old when we married.

S.FORM: Raynguanku niana ne nani.
taqa iku.
nani tmuRin smulud apaku a nayau si nengi ti a kiwku haw.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸就馬上答應。Kiwku也好。
My father agreed immediately. Kiwku was okay.

S.FORM: mai ti tu apa mai tu abu haw.
wantima amana ti pilaw pilaw nengi ti tani ti qenabinusna m zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: Only Grandmom Pilaw. For how many years could she still live?

S.FORM: taqa iku yu.
na'ay iku mangay papukun na'ay iku tiaRay mai zinku qaya.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有講說我不要ARay，我怕被打。
I didn't say ARay I didn't want to, (because) I'm afraid I would be beaten.

S.FORM: a taqa iku sinapawan zinku.
nayau nikasianemanta maipa mai pama ngid sinapawan si.
S.TRANSL: 我就是這樣想的，還不想結婚。
I thought so. I didn't want to marry yet.

S.FORM: mai pama ita Raqiin pama ita kyami nani.
mawtu tinaliz si siqatulu yu mawtu tama tinaliz nani.
S.TRANSL: The elder, Naliz, came three times.

S.FORM: en zika zinna.
a nayau si e konia pa kunaanta pa koniaku.
zinna ya kikung zinna kwa kuna kikung zinna koniaku zinna kebalan tu nayau kwa u m pameng ti ya tu tinhun pa tinhun niana na kyataya o taqa iku kyami.
S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] 訂婚也沒有什麼。我不要（結婚）。
[translation missing] Engagement means nothing. I don't want (to marry).

S.FORM: yau mai ti iku yu qman nani.
taqa iku nani yau a temusul taqatibuRan na lepawniq kyami nani.
S.TRANSL: There was a tree to the south of my house.

S.FORM: yau ti iku tayan.
yau zau nani quniakita.
pun ti ya baqian kyami smulud nani.
qasmin u taqa.
nayau ya pameng ti kikung ya.
kikung tu snaquni a masang.
S.TRANSL: Marriage was simple in the past.

S.FORM: m zin na tamaku.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸說以前結婚就是這樣。
'Marriage is like this,' said my father.

S.FORM: m e izau iza tu kelisiw qinipaya mala tu qinipaya tiaRay mala tu kelisiw anu.
anu makenanta tu izau silazat tu snazau.
S.TRANSL: 真的要結婚時，要在哪裡借錢？
If we were to marry, where could we borrow money?

S.FORM: nengi zinna ma nani.
minku sikiyanta naquni a minko siki.
S.TRANSL: Would we have the wedding of ROC?

S.FORM: taytaanku a tamun yau a saizi taquq nianu nani.
S.TRANSL: 我去看菜，有雞肉，什麼都有。
I checked the meals; there were chicken and everything.

S.FORM: akaw snazau saiza kikung zinku a nayau kikungnumi Ra yau zunpunumi.
S.TRANSL: 結婚就是那樣。你們就是這樣結婚的嗎？你們有煮菜的人嗎？
Marriage was like that. You got married in that way? Did you have chefs?

S.FORM: yau azu yau yu.
qaniyau titiana smani mRaRamaz ay yu.
S.TRANSL: I don't know who did the cooking.

S.FORM: qaya yu.
mRayngu iku mRamaz kyami.
pasi aizipna Ramaz ay taRnita.
S.TRANSL: 可能是他家的人煮菜，我不確定。
Perhaps his relatives did the cooking. I'm not sure.

S.FORM: mai nayau ya masang ay masang yau niana na masang qamai.
S.TRANSL: Life in the past was simple.

S.FORM: mai qaRmaq tiaRay ni.
S.TRANSL: ARay didn't treat his family well.

S.FORM: nayau en nayau taqa iku qawman taqaanku siyu.
S.TRANSL: Yes, that's it. I didn't want him.

S.FORM: yau iku malubi taqasupan m a tatemusulan.
S.TRANSL: I hid myself under the tree.

S.FORM: nayau lanas ay masang en ya niquduta tu sunissu.
pawRat qapatay pa iku zinku ni.
mala iku tu sapaqsangan 'nay.
S.TRANSL: 我去拿要包粽子的那個。
I took the thing for wrapping Zongzi.

S.FORM: ngid iku si mana nayauan tu sapaqsangan nani.
S.TRANSL: Why did you wrap that in that way?

S.FORM: wiya ti iku pasazui ta izaan tawian tapaRaRan ta qidisan na kuliR a yau yau iku tayan malubi.
S.TRANSL: I went to the cliff at KuliR and hid myself there.

S.FORM: qeRasan pama ticingay ticingay nani.
ti pipeRazanum pama ki masang nani.
zinku smisu pama sunisku ti kimlan.
S.TRANSL: My child, Kimlan, still needed breast-feeding.

S.FORM: anu patay iku si taRnina 'daq tazian.
S.TRANSL: 如果我死了，別人怎麼會知道我在這兒？
If I die, how do others know that I'm here?

S.FORM: yau iku ta taqumutan si.
taRnina iku kmilim.
sunisku saluna pa ti muRiwRing smisu pama zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我的小孩怎麼辦？一直哭，還在喝母奶。
What about my child? He kept crying and still needed breast-feeding.

S.FORM: mai pama qanansu.
baqsiwanku ti ya iyu 'nay.
ngid iku qan tu iyu.
S.TRANSL: I wanted to take the medicine.

S.FORM: na'ay iku qatapun titayliciw.
S.TRANSL: I didn't want to marry Tayliciw.

S.FORM: sunisku mai haw nani patay ti titayliciw mai kamwan anemku.
S.TRANSL: Tayliciw去世的時候，我也不甘願。

S.FORM: pameng iku Raputuy tu mana pameng isu muRing zinna iku ni kingciang nani.
S.TRANSL: 我夢到Kingciang跟我說：「你為什麼哭呢？」
I made a dream. 'Why are you crying?' said Kingciang to me.

S.FORM: mai iku muRing zinku naytiikangyu anu sikusiyuyutai ageluka zinna man lipun nani.
S.TRANSL: 「不要哭，給你一些財產好嗎？」他講日語。
'Don't cry, give you a little of my properties, OK?' he said in Japanese.

S.FORM: zaisangilangyu antaalepasolileiyo zinku.
S.TRANSL: 「什麼都不要，你在我身邊就好。」
'I want nothing. I only want you to be with me.'

S.FORM: Ramenenganku ni niana Rakiya zinku ti nani.
pasanuaka tikingciang tu niqatapunku zinku timangu.
S.TRANSL: 我要講給kingciang聽，我們在一起了。
I wanted to tell Kingciang that we were together (in my dream).

S.FORM: mai tu dawad pasanu yau tiubin.
S.TRANSL: I didn't have time. Ubin was there.

S.FORM: paskwa sikawkawma pameng ti ya RaRiwanna ti ita mpatay ay.
S.TRANSL: 過年時，他就突然走了，過世了。
He passed away during Chinese New Year.

S.FORM: mai kalingunanna tu pakunkuanku ti ya kaputku.
S.TRANSL: 他不會忘記，我跟我朋友講故事。
He wouldn't forget it. I told this to my friends.

S.FORM: mtawtawa ti quni pa qaya tmnun niana ti ma sapatawaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們笑。編織的時候沒有可以笑的。
They laughed. There is no laughingstock while we're weaving.

S.FORM: nayau saizi.
nilaziwan ti si.
wiya ti qmadabu a anemku nani.
yau izipku talepawan zinku.
naRin mtawa yu.
haw.
nayau a wawayta masang kikung tu tu nipatadu.
S.TRANSL: Marrying to the guy introduced by the elderly.

S.FORM: nayau nipatadu zaku qaya azu qenangidanta timeng nani msalas imi haw tatuqed ti imi ya ho usa ya metad timaisu qenataqaanku ni.
S.TRANSL: 我的也是介紹的。 [翻譯漏失] 我不要你。
Mine was also introduced (by the elderly). [translation missing] I don't want you.

S.FORM: tiana mngid timaisu.
en nayauanku tiana mngid timaisu.
S.TRANSL: Yes, I don't want you either.

S.FORM: yau pama tina tiepaw talibeng na zenaniq kwa.
S.TRANSL: Epaw老人家在我們水田的下方。
The elderly Epaw was at our paddy field.

S.FORM: tama ti taytaanku tama tinaliz si.
kakwa tama tinaliz qeRasika.
S.TRANSL: Hurry up. Call the elderly Naliz.

S.FORM: mai yu na mai mai izau tu anem ne mai ita tu anem mana pameng ita sasunis tu mazmun zinku qaya.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡他，為什麼生那麼多小孩？
I didn't like him. Why did we have so many children?

S.FORM: nayau saizi mana Rakiya sisunis ita.
kyami haw aita taqaanta nani mana en zinta qaya qawRatan.
S.TRANSL: 我們不喜歡。為什麼我們會一起睡。
We didn't like them. Why did we sleep together?

S.FORM: mtawa iku tu wawayku Raliz si nayau iku qaya.
S.TRANSL: 我也笑我自己。對啊。我也是這樣。
I laughed at what I did. Yes. Me too.

S.FORM: taqa isu mana yau sunissu zinna iku ni tiana ti qaya ti beliR.
S.TRANSL: 「你不喜歡，你為什麼有小孩？」BeliR這樣講。
'You don't like him. Why do you have children?' said BeliR.

S.FORM: tiangaw kaku nayau nayau mailiw imi masang nani taqa iku nazau imu kikung zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡他，你們結婚就是這樣嗎？
I don't like him. Your marriage is like that?

S.FORM: taqaansu nani mana sasunis isu ka zinna quniakita nani quniakita.
S.TRANSL: 你不喜歡他，為什麼生小孩？沒辦法。沒辦法。
You don't like him. Why do you have children? There is nothing we could do. There is nothing we could do.

S.FORM: kusi zinku tibeliR yu quniakita.
S.TRANSL: There is nothing we could do.

S.FORM: sunista si dui a zinta yu sunista si.
aiya zaku ay mazmun Rabetin nipaRuinku nani.
tadu mtaqa nani.
mana mwaza ya sunista zinku qaya m.
S.TRANSL: Why do we have so many children?

S.FORM: mulayta si unay yus ti nayau ma pulpunanta ti ya sikawmaanta tayan en.
S.TRANSL: 我們的小孩。好了，這樣好了。我們就講到這邊。對。
Our children. Okay. That's it. Our talk ends here. Okay.
